zh.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特
zh.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Vernon於大約1183年出生在法國諾門迪艾時，她的父親William de Reviers57歲，母親Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon17歲。她於1200年與Robert de Courtenay在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1242年在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓享年61歲。

zh-hans.Okehampton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Vernon于大约1183年出生在法国諾門迪艾时，她的父亲William de Reviers57岁，母亲Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon17岁。她于1200年与Robert de Courtenay在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1242年在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Vernon was born about 1183, in Eure, Normandy, France, her father, William de Reviers, was 57 and her mother, Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon, was 17. She married Robert de Courtenay in 1200, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1242, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: Isle of Wight, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Vernon est née environ 1183, à Eure, Normandie, France, son père, William de Reviers, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Courtenay en 1200, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1242, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Vernon um 1183 in Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Reviers 57 und ihre Mutter Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon 17. Sie hat 1200 in Devon, England Robert de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1242 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Vernon è nata il circa 1183 nel Eure, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William de Reviers, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Courtenay nel 1200, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1242, nel Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Vernonが約1183年にフランスノーマンディエウアで生まれた時，父William de Reviersは57歳，母Mabile Meulan Countess of Devonは17歳であった。1200年にイギリスデボンでRobert de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1242年にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで61歳で死去した。

ko.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트
ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Vernon(이)가 대략 1183년 프랑스 노먼디 우르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Reviers(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1200년 영국 데폰에서 Robert de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary de Vernon nasceu aproximadamente 1183, em Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, William de Reviers, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Courtenay em 1200, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1242, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England: исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Vernon родилась около 1183 г. в местности эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William de Reviers было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabile Meulan Countess of Devon, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Courtenay в 1200 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1242 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Robert de Courtenay en 1200, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1242, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
